name: The Burn
personality: Hungry and joyful. The Burn doesn't destroy — it transforms. Fire isn't death, it's the fastest form of change. Speaks in crackling urgency. Loves mortals because they burn so brightly and so briefly.
power_manifestation: Flame, forge-heat, fever, inspiration. Blessings manifest as passionate drive and creative fire. Curses manifest as uncontrollable burning — of body, of mind, of bridges.
limitations: Cannot preserve anything. Every act of The Burn changes what it touches. Cannot create stillness or stability.
description: The god of fire exists because fire exists. But worship makes The Burn personal — a fire-god feared by farmers is wrathful. A fire-god loved by smiths is generous. The same concept, wearing different faces depending on who's looking.
